[33mUsage:[0m [32mdemo[0m [36m<command>[0m [flags]

[33mCommands:[0m
  serve [flags]
    Run the HTTP server.

  migrate [36m<dir>[0m [flags]
    Run database migrations.

[33mFlags:[0m
  [32m-h[0m, [32m--help[0m       Show context-sensitive help.
  [32m-v[0m, [32m--verbose[0m    Enable verbose output.

Run "demo [36m<command>[0m [32m--help[0m" for more information on a command.
